mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_post (title, summary, content, author_id, status, views, likes, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{status}, #{views}, #{likes}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_post SET
title=#{title},
summary=#{summary},
content=#{content},
status=#{status},
update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_post WHERE id IN
#{item}
mapper.select: select * from t_post, (select post_id from t_post_category, (select id from t_category where title = #{title}) category where t_post_category.category_id = category.id ) selectposts where t_post.id = selectposts.post_id

select * from t_post, (select post_id from t_post_label, (select id from t_label where title = #{title}) label where t_post_label.label_id = label.id ) selectposts where t_post.id = selectposts.post_id
SELECT * FROM t_post ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
